# Code of Conduct

This is a small open-source project. The rules are short:

- **Be kind.** Treat everyone with respect — maintainers, contributors, and
  people asking questions for the first time.
- **Assume good faith.** Nobody is here to ruin your day.
- **Keep it on topic.** Issues and PRs are about Storyteller; let's keep
  unrelated debates somewhere else.
- **No harassment, no personal attacks, no bigotry** — not in issues, PRs,
  commits, code, or anywhere else attached to this project.

If someone's behavior makes you uncomfortable, please reach out to the
maintainer privately (see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for a private channel).
We'll handle it quietly and proportionately — usually a friendly nudge,
occasionally a stronger one, very rarely a removal.

This is a lightweight, hobby-grade code of conduct. If you need a more
formal framework, the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/)
is a good starting point.
